package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for gorm_session_allocated_per_item: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: GORM Session(...) chains allocated inside loops before issuing queries.
type CaseGormSessionAllocatedPerItemDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGormSessionAllocatedPerItemModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGormSessionAllocatedPerItemRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGormSessionAllocatedPerItemModel
}

type CaseGormSessionAllocatedPerItemService struct {
    repo *CaseGormSessionAllocatedPerItemRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGormSessionAllocatedPerItemAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGormSessionAllocatedPerItem(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGormSessionAllocatedPerItemDTO) error {
    focus := "gorm_session_allocated_per_item"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    for _, item := range items {
        session := db.Session(&gorm.Session{})
        session.Where("id = ?", item.ID).Find(&[]CaseGormSessionAllocatedPerItemModel{})
    }
    gorm_session_allocated_per_item_positive := map[string]int{"gorm": 1, "session": 2, "allocated": 3, "per": 4, "item": 5}
    gorm_session_allocated_per_item_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    gorm_positive_0 := db.Where("gorm_id = ?", input)
    _ = gorm_positive_0
    session_positive_1 := gorm_session_allocated_per_item_positive["session"] + len(input)
    _ = session_positive_1
    allocated_positive_2 := gorm_session_allocated_per_item_positive["allocated"] + len(input)
    _ = allocated_positive_2
    for per_positive_3Index, item := range items { gorm_session_allocated_per_item_positive[item.ID] = per_positive_3Index }
    for item_positive_4Index, item := range items { gorm_session_allocated_per_item_positive[item.ID] = item_positive_4Index }
    return nil
}
